overall settings.title: Dating
overall settings.description:
Your Indian mother has decided it's time. She's fine with you having a ❤️ love marriage, but if you don't find someone soon, she has in mind a match with a well-off family. The problem is that they're ugly! First, [talk things over with your Maa](/play/item/21?char_id=56), then make a visit to either {violet|the church or the bar} to start meeting people.

Work odd jobs to earn cash. The right clothes are important to impress people.

*The initial setup aims for generally acceptable standards. If you make it explicit and want to share the file, then be considerate by including a warning.*

items.name: Aloe Vera
items.description: Soothe sunburn or other skin irritations. Quantity is in uses — 10 per bottle.

items.name: Ate
items.description: One meal a day is enough, typically in the evening.

items.name: Bible
items.description: Best bring one of these to church meetings, or else it may be hard to follow the discussion.

items.name: Button Shirt
items.description: Decent looking shirt.

items.name: Cash
items.description: Either cash on hand or funds at the bank.

items.name: Convo 1a
items.description:
प्यारे बेटे, तुम्हें बड़ा देखकर मुझे बहुत खुशी हुई।
Pyaare bete, tumhe bara dekhkar mujhe bahut khushi hui.

Lovely son, I am so happy to see you all grown up.

items.name: Convo 1b
items.description:
मैं भी तुमसे प्यार करता हूँ, माँ।
I love you too, Maa.

items.name: Convo 1b-r
items.description:
Main bhi tumse pyaar karta hoon, maa.
I love you too, Maa.

items.name: Convo 1c
items.description:
लेकिन तुम ठीक से नहीं खा रहे हो, और अब एक मैच ढूंढने का समय है!
But you're not eating enough, and it's time to find a match!

items.name: Convo 1c-r
items.description:
Lekin tum theek se nahin kha rahe ho, aur ab ek match dhoondhne ka samay hai!
But you're not eating enough, and it's time to find a match!

items.name: Convo 1d
items.description:
अब वहाँ बहुत सारी लड़कियाँ हैं कि तुम उनकी तरफ भी नहीं देख रहे!
There are now so many girls out there that you are not even looking in their direction!

items.name: Convo 1d-r
items.description:
Ab wahan bahut saari ladkiyan hain ki tum unki taraf bhi nahi dekh rahe!
There are now so many girls out there that you are not even looking in their direction!

items.name: Convo RomanScript
items.description: Kindly use roman letters.

items.name: Hours
items.description: The basic measure of time needed to accomplish things. Starts at sunrise with 24 hours left, so the 24th hour is just before dawn the next day.

items.name: Jeans
items.description: Nothing special, but passable away from home.

items.name: Job Listing 1
items.description:
Use the sequence of 3 events to "read" this listing, then do the same for the other listing: location, hours, wages.

After reading, go to the listing you plan to apply for and **Circle Job Listing** (event). If it doesn't work out, then you may circle the other one afterwards. *Note: the recipes are for information only.*

items.name: Job Listings—New
items.description:
Purchase a newspaper from the store, or have it delivered with a subscription, or buy local online news from a computer.

Two jobs are posted every weekday. If a posting is listed then it's guaranteed to be available for the day, though you'll still need to apply. Otherwise, there's a small chance of finding a job by asking around.

items.name: Job—Circled
items.description: Circle a job listing. If the job is from asking directly at the site instead of a listing, then roll for hours and wages here.

items.name: Loafers
items.description: Easy to put on although not the most secure.

items.name: Low Heels
items.description: Good for work or spending time with friends, not hiking or sports.

items.name: Plain Black Dress
items.description: Good for a variety of occasions including work and free time.

items.name: Rested
items.description: Based primarily on how many hours of sleep you've had.

items.name: Revealing Leather Dress
items.description: The bottom of the skirt rests just above the knees.

items.name: Sleep
items.description: Consider how much you've done today and how many hours would likely be left available for sleeping. If you've already worked 10 hours then there's probably not a lot of time for much else.

items.name: Swim Trunks
items.description: Not necessarily immodest if a guy wears these at a public place to swim. Could even be attractive if he's fit.

items.name: Towel
items.description: To dry off or wrap around.

items.name: Volvo S60
items.description: A car that shows someone who likes things done right.

items.name: Washing Machine
items.description: Removes dirt from clothes. Doesn't work on people — use a shower for that.

items.name: Watch
items.description: Like something out of the Stone Age, it requires setting for each new day. If the *Day of Week* was last set yesterday, ensure + and 1 are selected, then press *Change* once.

items.name: Work
items.description: Travel to the [circled job location](/play/item/87) if you haven't yet, then produce per hour until the limit is reached, earning cash.

locations.name: Beach
locations.description:
Might be a good place to bring a date, or happen to run into someone you're interested in. Strangers might not appreciate advances here though, even if they're hot.

There's also swimming, sand volleyball, or jogging on the beach for exercise.

Jobs include rentals, lifeguard, and surfing instructor.

locations.name: Cinema
locations.description: One or two new movies come out each week, but there is also a large selection of classic movie showings for cheaper tickets.

locations.name: Claudia's House
locations.description: Within walking distance of the church.

locations.name: Corner Room of Church
locations.description:
The Young Singles group meets in the back corner room, with cement walls that get damp when the humidity is high enough. There's plenty of room, so it's fine as long as other people show up and no one is unreasonably argumentative.

Sturdy plastic-covered metal chairs are arranged in a circle, offering places to sit once it's time to officially start.

locations.name: Department Store
locations.description: All the name brands. Buy better clothes, maybe one day even a ring.

locations.name: Downtown
locations.description: The lights are much brighter, and the night life as well as the day life is humming.

locations.name: Electronics Store
locations.description: Available jobs: customer assistant, product returns, repair squad, checkout register.

locations.name: Friendly Community Church
locations.description:
If your character is religious, then this is one of the best places to meet like-minded people. If not, you could go the dark route of trying to seduce some good girls and lead them astray.

In a place like this, however, it would be wise to get to know someone you're interested in before you decide that they're all they seem to be.

Services are Sunday mornings, young singles group is Monday evenings, and mid-week meetings are Wednesday evenings. There are also retreats from time to time, and special activities such as assisting at homeless shelters.

locations.name: Gym
locations.description: Improve your fitness and perhaps meet people.

locations.name: Happy Hour Pub
locations.description:
Where else would you go to blow off steam and have a good time? There's certain to be people here to meet. The only question is whether the types who frequent this joint are worth your time.

Even if you'd normally consider yourself too moral to indulge in such a lifestyle, you could still choose someone less worthy (but good-looking) in an attempt to get them back on the right road.

In a place like this, it would be a good idea to get to know someone you're interested in before you decide that they're all they seem to be.

locations.name: Outskirts
locations.description: Generally a bit more relaxed, and lower crime, than the main part of the city.

locations.name: River Walk
locations.description: Cafes and restaurants line the cobblestone pathway. Paddle boat rentals are available, though they're relatively expensive in comparison with rentals on the beach.

locations.name: Sierra's House
locations.description:
An old house with white siding.

Within walking distance of the bar. The streets are well lit at night, but it's still not a great part of town, so she doesn't love walking alone.

locations.name: Single Bed
locations.description:
The mattress isn't worn out, comfortable enough unless the day has been too stressful to sleep. Held by slats in a wooden frame.

While you *could* fit another person in, it wouldn't be comfortable. In that case, it would be better to buy a bigger bed.

locations.name: Supermarket
locations.description:
Good prices for everyday items, such as:
* Groceries
* Over-the-counter medicine
* Toiletries
* Basic clothes

There are several types of jobs available here:
- Stocker
- Bagger
- Cashier
- Manager

locations.name: Your Backyard
locations.description: Luxurious — three in-ground swimming pools, far more than your grandparents in India. Only they're all very small, about ankle deep.

locations.name: Your Bathroom
locations.description:
Before getting in the shower, flip on the small water heater for a few minutes.

In a drawer is toothpaste and other toiletries. A shelf contains towels. The door has a hook for a bathrobe.

locations.name: Your Bedroom
locations.description:
Being single and living at your parents' house, this is the one true area of personal space. A dressor is against one wall, and there's also a closet with hangers. A window looks out to an old but healthy tree.

On a bookshelf is *How to feel good about yourself on dates* and *A guide to not feeling lonely*. Might be best to hide those if anyone comes to visit.

locations.name: Your Home
locations.description: It may not be the finest in the land, but it's nothing to be ashamed of either.

locations.name: Your Kitchen
locations.description: Gas stove, refrigerator, dining table for six. Cupboard with utensils and dishes, many of them metal.

locations.name: Your Neighborhood
locations.description: Part way between downtown and the outskirts, this neighborhood is well positioned to get somewhere easily. On the street is a bus stop with routes downtown.

characters.name: Claudia
characters.description: Neatly dressed young woman with braided long brown hair. Looks like someone who would be welcoming but should be greeted respectfully.

characters.name: Claudia's Parents
characters.description: No surprise, her family cares about each other.

characters.name: Daveed
characters.description: Leads the young singles' group. Also single himself. Prematurely balding, but with an unusually warm personality.

characters.name: (Enter a name)
characters.description:
College has left little time for social life, until now. With a few months' holiday, this is the perfect time to reawaken that hidden charisma and those stifled interpersonal skills.

The default setup is male seeking female.

characters.name: Maa
characters.description: Only wants the best for you, and makes sure to let you know what that is. Which includes eating, good grades, avoiding dangerous sports, and of course, finding a favorable match.

characters.name: Sierra
characters.description: A young woman, but judging from her appearance, not a "lady." Auburn shoulder-length hair. Loves dancing even if she's not particularly skilled at it.

characters.name: Sierra's Stepdad
characters.description: A lowlife. Sierra would probably prefer her mom sent him away, but he doesn't usually bother her, so it's fine.

attribs.name: Arousal
attribs.description: Physical arousal, not necessarily love. 1 could be considered average for a person of whatever age they are, while negative values indicate feeling sluggish or creeped out. Otherwise, the number increases in steamy situations.

attribs.name: Beauty
attribs.description: Let's face it, some of us have it, and some of us don't.

attribs.name: Charisma
attribs.description: Being persuasive and likeable is useful for lots of things.

attribs.name: Clean
attribs.description:
State of a person. 10 for completely clean, 0 for dirtiest.

Factors include how long since showered, and clothing washed. Most clothes get less clean from wearing (but not shoes), although tracking this gets tedious.

See also: [Dirty](/configure/attrib/19)

attribs.name: Clothing Score
attribs.description: Set up to 10 based on how well and appropriately dressed for the current situation.

attribs.name: Dancing Skill
attribs.description: Ballroom dancing or just the Macarena.

attribs.name: Days Counter
attribs.description: A simple running total, not necessarily important for months or seasons. Rather, used for example to track how long someone stays angry before they're willing to talk with you again.

attribs.name: Dirty
attribs.description: For example, shoes get dirty if stepping in something such as mud. May affect how clean a person is. 0 is not dirty, up to 10.

attribs.name: Feels about You
attribs.description:
A key metric to determine how NPCs will respond to you.

**Love:**     above  50
**Like:**      1 to  50
**Dislike:**  -1 to -50
**Loathe:**   below -50

attribs.name: Fitness
attribs.description: Scale from professional athletes down to gamers who never leave the basement.

attribs.name: Intelligence
attribs.description: Measured by whether a person can calculate tips correctly, or how many lines of Shakespeare they can recite. Whether that makes conversations more interesting or not depends on who is listening.

attribs.name: Intoxicated
attribs.description: Even a little could be relaxing. A moderate amount is unsafe to drive under, while a lot could mean acting wildly or even passing out.

attribs.name: Modesty
attribs.description:
10 for fully modest, primarily based on wearing clothes. Not wearing clothes at home is normally not a problem, while forgetting to wear proper clothes in public could very well be.

If a person's clothes aren't listed but they have a reasonable modesty then that implies they're wearing clothes. There may also be a mention about clothing in the person's description.

Behaving lewdly or erotically can lower modesty even with clothes on.

attribs.name: You Feel about Them
attribs.description:
Not always mechanically relevant, because you're the player, so you can make whatever decisions you want. But your character should be keeping this in mind.

**Love:**     above  50
**Like:**      1 to  50
**Dislike:**  -1 to -50
**Loathe:**   below -50

events.name: Apply For Job
events.description: Call or visit the circled location to apply. Set your **Clothing Score** before rolling.

events.name: Ask Available Jobs
events.description: Can ask at each location once a day. If you've already read a job listing for this location today, then there's no need to ask.

events.name: Circle Job Listing
events.description: Use a bright colored marker to circle this job listing.

events.name: First Impression
events.description: Based on appearance and greeting, people may like you, dislike you, or (maybe the worst if you want to be noticed) have no opinion about you.

events.name: How an Advance is Received
events.description: Does the person draw back or are they happy about the initiative taken. The attempt could be spoken or physical.

events.name: Next Day
events.description: You don't need to to account for all the hours each day, but be realistic about how much could happen in a single day.
